page_title: What Are AI Hallucinations? And How To Improve Accuracy in Pipelines
ideas: What are AI hallucinations? | What causes AI hallucinations? | Types of AI hallucinations | How to prevent AI hallucinations | Building hallucination-resistant AI pipelines in n8n | Produce reliable outputs with n8n | Share with us
summary: AI pipelines rarely fail loudly. They run, return clean outputs, and pass downstream validation — except the answer is wrong. A summarization step invents metrics. A classification agent returns inconsistent labels. None throw exceptions, so pipelines look fine. These failures are AI hallucinations.

page_title: Data Mapping Best Practices for Cross-System Integration
ideas: What data mapping actually does in a pipeline | Data mapping techniques | 6 data mapping best practices for production pipelines | How to prevent common data mapping failure modes | Automating data mapping in workflow pipelines | Build for the long haul with n8n | Share with us
summary: Data rarely lives in the same place it was created. Every time you sync customer records between systems, you’re forced to deal with different schemas. Without a systematic approach, pipelines become a tangle of undocumented scripts and fragile ETL data mapping logic that breaks the moment a source system changes.

page_title: Comparing 8 Cloud Integration Platforms for Enterprise IT
ideas: What a cloud integration platform actually does | What to look for in a cloud integration platform | The best cloud integration platforms | Building for the AI-driven stack | Futureproof your enterprise stack with n8n | Share with us
summary: Choosing an integration layer is a significant commitment that’s notoriously difficult to walk back. If you pick a platform that doesn’t scale or locks your data into a proprietary black box, you’re stuck with it — along with the burden of mounting costs and technical debt.
